description: Standard API response envelope implemented as a nested data class — immutable, auto-equality, shareable across all services.
Generic type parameter T lets ApiResponse wrap any payload type while maintaining compile-time type safety.

codeSnippet:
companion object {
    fun <T> success(data: T): ApiResponse<T> =
        ApiResponse(success = true, data = data)

    fun <T> success(): ApiResponse<T> =
        ApiResponse(success = true)

    fun <T> error(errorCode: ErrorCode): ApiResponse<T> =
        ApiResponse(success = false, error = ErrorDetail(...))
}
description: Factory methods in companion object provide named constructors (success/error) — idiomatic Kotlin alternative to static factory methods.

codeSnippet:
fun generateAccessToken(userId: String, roles: List<String>): String =
    Jwts.builder()
        .claim("userId", userId)
        .claim("roles", roles)
        .claim("type", "access")
        .issuedAt(Date())
        .expiration(Date(System.currentTimeMillis() + props.accessExpiry * 1000L))
        .signWith(key)
        .compact()
description: Generates HMAC-signed JWT access tokens with userId/roles claims and configurable expiry — shared utility for all services.
Centralized @RestControllerAdvice maps domain BusinessException subtypes to HTTP status codes — single responsibility error translation.
Enum with message property centralizes all error codes and human-readable messages as a shared vocabulary.
Exception hierarchy with open base class and typed subclasses — polymorphic catch in GlobalExceptionHandler dispatches all subtypes.
